title: praxelis odontodactyla
intro: Praxelis odontodactyla, also known as toothbrush plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Praxelis odontodactyla include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
